description_long: This lamppost features a robust, dark metallic structure with three lantern-style light fixtures suspended from ornate, symmetrical scrollwork arms. The central post is thick and angular, tapering slightly as it rises to support the horizontal bar from which the lanterns hang. Each lantern has a polygonal, slightly tapered body with yellow-tinted panels, suggesting a warm light source within. The scrollwork arms are geometric and stylized, adding a decorative flair reminiscent of Victorian or Art Nouveau influences. The base is solid and squared, designed for stable ground installation in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. The overall design combines both functional illumination and ornamental appeal, making it suitable for enhancing the aesthetic of public spaces.
description: A decorative, dark metal lamppost with three yellow-glass lanterns suspended from ornate scrollwork arms and a sturdy square base.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lanterns evenly spaced and the symmetrical scrollwork arms.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing the three lanterns and scrollwork, with minor perspective shift.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, nearly identical to the previous, maintaining visibility of all lanterns and decorative arms.
description_view_3: Final view, similar to the others, with all lanterns and scrollwork arms visible from a slightly different angle.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Polygonal lantern-style heads with yellow-tinted panels and angular frames, reminiscent of Victorian street lamps.
